title: Venezuelan Briny Wrap
description: A flavorful and savory Venezuelan-inspired dish wrapped in a warm tortilla.
instructions: Heat the Venezuelan rice according to the package instructions.
In a pan, sauté the chopped xerisced onion until softened.
Add the briny cheese to the pan and stir until melted.
Combine the cooked rice and onion-cheese mixture.
Warm the wrap in the microwave or oven.
Assemble the Venezuelan Briny Wrap by placing the rice mixture onto the warmed wrap.
